name: recovery_probe
lock_risk: Creates one new empty foundation table and revokes inherited write grants; it does not alter an existing product table.
representative_data: Runs after migration 000001 with a bounded synthetic permission-probe row set.
query_plan_review: No data-reading or data-rewriting statement exists; query-plan review is not applicable.
space_risk: One empty control table and one primary-key index only.
forward_fix: Add a new ordered migration if recovery-probe structure changes; never rewrite version 2.
rollback: After release, preserve the table and correct behavior with a forward migration.
